mapper.select:
/* scanMapper.getAppFormData */
SELECT CASE WHEN MAINDATA.MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB = 1 then 0 WHEN MODEL_PRICE-(MAINDATA.OPEN_DISCOUNT + MAINDATA.ADD_DISCOUNT) <= 0 then 0 ELSE TRUNC((MODEL_PRICE-(MAINDATA.OPEN_DISCOUNT + MAINDATA.ADD_DISCOUNT))*0.059/12*POWER((1+0.059/12), MODEL_MONTHLY)/(POWER((1+0.059/12), MODEL_MONTHLY)-1),0) - TRUNC(((MODEL_PRICE-(MAINDATA.OPEN_DISCOUNT + MAINDATA.ADD_DISCOUNT))/MODEL_MONTHLY),0) END AS MODEL_MM_CHARGE, CASE WHEN INST_AMT <= 0 THEN 0 ELSE DECODE(MAINDATA.MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB, 1, 0, ROUND( (INST_AMT + ( TRUNC(INST_AMT * 0.059 / 12 * VAL_POW / (VAL_POW-1),0) * MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB - INST_AMT) ) / MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB ,0) ) END AS MODEL_MM_PAYMENT, /*핸드폰 월 납부액 단말요금 : (할부원금+총할부수수료)/할부개월수 */ CASE WHEN MAINDATA.MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB = 1 THEN 0 WHEN MODEL_PRICE-(MAINDATA.OPEN_DISCOUNT + MAINDATA.ADD_DISCOUNT) <= 0 THEN 0 ELSE DECODE(MAINDATA.MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB, 1, 0, TRUNC((MODEL_PRICE-(MAINDATA.OPEN_DISCOUNT + MAINDATA.ADD_DISCOUNT))/ MAINDATA.MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB) ) END AS REAL_MM_MONEY, /* 월 할부금 */ CASE WHEN INST_AMT > 0 THEN DECODE(MAINDATA.MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB, 1, MAINDATA.TEL_MM_PATMENT, ROUND( ( INST_AMT + ( TRUNC(INST_AMT * 0.059 / 12 * VAL_POW / (VAL_POW-1),0) * MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB - INST_AMT ) ) / MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB ,0) + MAINDATA.TEL_MM_PATMENT ) ELSE MAINDATA.TEL_MM_PATMENT END AS BASIC_MM_PAYMENT, MAINDATA.OPEN_DISCOUNT + MAINDATA.ADD_DISCOUNT AS CONTRACT_SUPPORT, MODEL_MONTHLY, '4' AS PAGE4DEFAULT, MAINDATA.* FROM ( SELECT REQUEST_KEY, MODEL_PRICE-(NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT1, 0) + NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) + NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT3, 0)) AS INST_AMT , -- 할부원금 POWER((1+0.059/12), MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB) AS VAL_POW , -- 년 수수년 계산 CASE WHEN SPRT_TP = 'KD' THEN '0' WHEN SPRT_TP = 'PM' THEN '2' WHEN REQ_BUY_TYPE = 'UU' AND ENGG_MNTH_CNT > 1 THEN '1' ELSE '' END DISCOUNTPR, MODEL_PRICE , PROD_TYPE , /* GREATEST(NVL( (MODEL_PRICE ) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT1, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT3, 0), 0),0) AS MODEL_INSTALLMENT, */ DECODE( PROD_TYPE,'02','0', '01',GREATEST(NVL( (MODEL_PRICE ) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT1, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT3, 0), 0),0), NULL,GREATEST(NVL( (MODEL_PRICE ) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT1, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT3, 0), 0),0) ) AS MODEL_INSTALLMENT, NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT1, 0) + NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) AS OPEN_DISCOUNT, NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT3, 0) AS ADD_DISCOUNT, 0 AS MODEL_DISCOUNT, NVL(INST_INTRATE, 0.25 ) AS INST_INTRATE, MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB, RES_NO, OPER_TYPE, CSTMR_TYPE_ORG, CSTMR_TYPE, ETC_SPECIAL, REQ_USIM_NAME, REQ_USIM_SN, PHONE_PAYMENT, REQ_IN_DAY_YYYY, REQ_IN_DAY_MM, REQ_IN_DAY_DD, REQ_ADDITION, REQ_ADDITION_PRICE, USIM_PRICE_TYPE, USIM_PRICE, JOIN_PRICE_TYPE, CSTMR_NAME, CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN, CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE, CSTMR_MAIL, CSTMR_ADDR, CSTMR_ADDR_BJD, CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN, REQ_PAY_TYPE, REQ_BANK, REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, REQ_CARD_YY, REQ_CARD_MM, REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME, REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION, REQ_WANT_NUMBER, REQ_WANT_NUMBER2, REQ_WANT_NUMBER3, REQ_WIRE_TYPE, REQ_AC01_BALANCE, REQ_AC01_AMOUNT, REQ_AC02_DAY, REQ_AC02_AMOUNT, REQ_GUIDE, REQ_GUIDE_FN, REQ_GUIDE_MN, REQ_GUIDE_RN, MOVE_MOBILE_FN, MOVE_AUTH_TYPE, MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_1, MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_2, MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_3, MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_4, MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE, MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT, MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG, MOVE_COMPANY, MOVE_COMPANY_MVNO, TRUNC (MONTHLY_FEE * 1.1, -1) AS MONTHLY_FEE, DISCOUNT_PRICE, RATE_NAME, TEL_MM_PATMENT, REQ_CARD_COMPANY, REQ_CARD_NO, PAGE3DEFAULT, AGENT_CODE, NAME_CHANGE_NM, NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN, NAME_CHANGE_RRN, NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT, MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MINOR_AGENT_RELATION, MINOR_AGENT_RRN, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN, ENTRUST_REQ_NM, ENTRUST_RES_NM, ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION, ENTRUST_RES_RRN, ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN, SERVICE_TYPE, REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG, REQ_CARD_NAME, CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG, REQ_BUY_TYPE, DECODE(REQ_BUY_TYPE,'MM','P',DECODE(USIM_KINDS_CD,'09','E','U')) AS USIM_KINDS_CD, -- USIM, eSIM , 단말기 구분 REQ_MODEL_NAME, (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0044' AND CD_VAL = REQ_MODEL_COLOR) AS REQ_MODEL_COLOR, CASE WHEN TO_NUMBER(MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB) <= 1 THEN 'R' WHEN TO_NUMBER(MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB) > 1 THEN 'P' ELSE 'S' END AS MODEL_MONTHLY_TYPE, OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN, OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG, OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM, OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION, SOC_CODE, CNTPNT_SHOP_ID, MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE, ENGG_MNTH_CNT, NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN, APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN, NVL(CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG,'N') AS CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, APP_CD, APP_CD_NAME,ETC_DISCOUNT, MODEL_MONTHLY, NVL(CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP,'N') AS CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP, --단말배상금 안내사항 동의여부 NVL(CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR,'N') AS CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR, --단말배상금(부분파손) 안내사항 동의여부 NVL(CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE,'N') AS CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE, --중고렌탈 프로그램 서비스 이용에 대한 동의서 동의여부 CLAUSE_MPPS35_FLAG, --선불요금제 MPPS35 제약사항 동의 여부 CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG, --동부화재 제휴 요금제 약관 동의 여부 NVL(CLAUSE_5G_COVERAGE_FLAG,'N' )AS CLAUSE_5G_COVERAGE_FLAG, --5g 커버리지 확인 및 가입 동의 NVL(PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE,'N') AS PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE, --고객 혜택 제공을 위한 개인정보 수집 및 이용 관련 동의 NVL(OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE,'N') AS OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE, --혜택 제공을 위한 제3자 제공 동의(엠모바일) NVL(CLAUSE_PARTNER_OFFER_FLAG,'N') AS CLAUSE_PARTNER_OFFER_FLAG, --개인정보 제3자 제공 동의(제휴사) OPEN_MARKET_REFERER, --제휴사 JEHU_PROD_TYPE, --제휴처(제휴요금제) JEHU_PARTNER_TYPE, --제휴사 구분(서식지) NVL(OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE,'N') AS OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE, --혜택 제공을 위한 제3자 제공 동의(KT) NVL(OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE,'N') AS OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE, --제 3자 제공 동의 NVL(CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG , 'N') as CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG, -- 민감정보(생체인식정보)수집 및 이용동의 NVL(CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG , 'N') as CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG2, -- 민감정보(생체인식정보)수집 및 이용동의 NVL(COMBINE_SOLO_FLAG , 'N') as COMBINE_SOLO_FLAG -- 아무나솔로 결합 신청 동의 FROM ( SELECT A.*, TRUNC( ( (NVL(b.DC_AMT,0) ) + NVL(b.ADD_DC_AMT,0)) * 1.1 , 0) AS DISCOUNT_PRICE, TRUNC(A.MONTHLY_FEE * 1.1 - ( ((NVL(b.DC_AMT,0)) + NVL(b.ADD_DC_AMT,0)) * 1.1), -1) AS TEL_MM_PATMENT FROM ( SELECT MQ.REQUEST_KEY, OSPM.INST_RATE AS INST_INTRATE, MQ.ONLINE_AUTH_INFO AS RES_NO, MRS.SOC_CODE, MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID, MRS.MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE, DECODE(MQ.PROD_TYPE,'01',MRS.MODEL_PRICE + MRS.MODEL_PRICE_VAT,NULL,MRS.MODEL_PRICE + MRS.MODEL_PRICE_VAT,'02',MRS.RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT) AS MODEL_PRICE, MQ.PROD_TYPE, MRS.MODEL_DISCOUNT1, MRS.MODEL_DISCOUNT2, MRS.MODEL_DISCOUNT3, CASE WHEN OOIM.ORGN_NM IS NOT NULL THEN OOIM.ORGN_NM WHEN MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100011741' THEN 'M모바일(직영온라인)' WHEN MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100011744' THEN 'M모바일(사내특판)' WHEN MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100011745' THEN '총판((주)프리피아)' WHEN MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100005928' THEN 'M모바일(직영온라인)' WHEN MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100013265' THEN '홈쇼핑' ELSE '온라인' END AS AGENT_CODE, MQ.OPER_TYPE, CSTMR_TYPE AS CSTMR_TYPE_ORG, DECODE(CSTMR_TYPE , 'NM','NA','FN','NE',CSTMR_TYPE) AS CSTMR_TYPE, MQ.ETC_SPECIAL, MQ.REQ_USIM_NAME, TO_CHAR (MQ.REQ_USIM_SN) AS REQ_USIM_SN, PHONE_PAYMENT, SUBSTR (TO_CHAR (MQ.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDD'), 1, 4) AS REQ_IN_DAY_YYYY, SUBSTR (TO_CHAR (MQ.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDD'), 5, 2) AS REQ_IN_DAY_MM, SUBSTR (TO_CHAR (MQ.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDD'), 7, 2) AS REQ_IN_DAY_DD, DECODE (NVL (MRS.MODEL_MONTHLY, 0), '0', '1', MRS.MODEL_MONTHLY) AS MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB, /** 할부 개월수 **/ MODEL_MONTHLY, MQ.REQ_ADDITION, TO_CHAR (MQ.REQ_ADDITION_PRICE) AS REQ_ADDITION_PRICE, MRS.USIM_PRICE_TYPE, TO_CHAR (MRS.USIM_PRICE) AS USIM_PRICE, MRS.JOIN_PRICE_TYPE, MRC.CSTMR_NAME, /**substr(MRC.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN,1,6) AS CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, **/ CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN, NVL(FN_GET_CODENM('RCP2038', MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION), MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION) AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION, MRC.CSTMR_TEL_FN || '-' || MRC.CSTMR_TEL_MN || '-' || MRC.CSTMR_TEL_RN || ',' || MRC.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || '-' || MRC.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || '-' || MRC.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN AS CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN, MRC.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE, MRC.CSTMR_MAIL, MRC.CSTMR_ADDR || ' ' || MRC.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL AS CSTMR_ADDR, MRC.CSTMR_ADDR_BJD, MRC.OTHERS_PAYMENT_RNM, MRC.CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER, MRC.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER, MRC.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN, MCENB.CODE_NAME AS REQ_BANK, MRR.REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, MRR.REQ_CARD_YY, REQ_CARD_MM, MRR.REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME, MRR.REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION, MRR.REQ_CARD_COMPANY, MRR.REQ_CARD_NO, MQ.REQ_WANT_NUMBER, MQ.REQ_WANT_NUMBER2, MQ.REQ_WANT_NUMBER3, MRR.REQ_WIRE_TYPE, MQ.REQ_PAY_TYPE, TO_CHAR (MRP.REQ_AC01_BALANCE) AS REQ_AC01_BALANCE, TO_CHAR (MRP.REQ_AC01_AMOUNT) AS REQ_AC01_AMOUNT, MRP.REQ_AC02_DAY, TO_CHAR (MRP.REQ_AC02_AMOUNT) AS REQ_AC02_AMOUNT, CASE WHEN(MRM.REQ_GUIDE_MN IS NOT NULL ) THEN MRM.REQ_GUIDE_FN||'-'||MRM.REQ_GUIDE_MN||'-'||MRM.REQ_GUIDE_RN ELSE '' END AS REQ_GUIDE, MRM.REQ_GUIDE_FN, MRM.REQ_GUIDE_MN, MRM.REQ_GUIDE_RN, DECODE (MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_MN, NULL, NULL, MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_FN || '-' || MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_MN || '-' || MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_RN) AS MOVE_MOBILE_FN, MRM.MOVE_AUTH_TYPE, SUBSTR (MRM.MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER, 1, 1) AS MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_1, SUBSTR (MRM.MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER, 2, 1) AS MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_2, SUBSTR (MRM.MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER, 3, 1) AS MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_3, SUBSTR (MRM.MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER, 4, 1) AS MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_4, MRM.MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE, MRM.MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT, MRM.MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG, CASE WHEN MRM.MOVE_COMPANY IN ('SKT', 'LGT', 'KTF') THEN MRM.MOVE_COMPANY WHEN MRM.MOVE_COMPANY IS NOT NULL THEN 'MVNO' ELSE '' END AS MOVE_COMPANY, CASE WHEN MRM.MOVE_COMPANY IN ('SKT', 'LGT', 'KTF') THEN '' ELSE MC.CODE_NAME END AS MOVE_COMPANY_MVNO, MR.BASE_AMT AS MONTHLY_FEE, MR.RATE_NM AS RATE_NAME, '3' AS PAGE3DEFAULT, MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_NM, DECODE (MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN, NULL, NULL, MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN || '-' || MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN || '-' || MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN) AS NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN, MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_RRN, MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT, MRA.MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MCMINOR.CODE_NAME AS MINOR_AGENT_RELATION, MRA.MINOR_AGENT_RRN, DECODE(MRA.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN, NULL, NULL, MRA.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN || '-' || MRA.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN || '-' || MRA.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN) AS MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN, MRA.ENTRUST_REQ_NM, MRA.ENTRUST_RES_NM, MCENT.CODE_NAME AS ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION, MRR.REQ_CARD_NAME, MRA.ENTRUST_RES_RRN, MQ.SERVICE_TYPE, MQ.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG, MQ.REQ_BUY_TYPE, MQ.USIM_KINDS_CD, MQ.REQ_MODEL_NAME, MQ.REQ_MODEL_COLOR, DECODE ( MRA.ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN, NULL, NULL, MRA.ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN || '-' || MRA.ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN || '-' || MRA.ENTRUST_RES_TEL_RN) AS ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN, MRR.REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG, CASE WHEN REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'C' THEN REQ_CARD_RRN WHEN REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'D' THEN REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN ELSE CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN END AS OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN, CASE WHEN MINOR_AGENT_NAME IS NOT NULL OR (REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'C' AND REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG = 'Y') OR (REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'D' AND REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG = 'Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG, CASE WHEN REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'C' THEN REQ_CARD_NAME WHEN REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'D' THEN REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME ELSE CSTMR_NAME END AS OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM, NVL(MCMINOR.CODE_NAME, '본인') AS OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION, NVL( MRS.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 0 ) AS ENGG_MNTH_CNT, MQ.NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN, MQ.APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN, MQ.CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, DECODE(MQ.APP_CD,'1','1','3','3',null,'' ,'','','0')AS APP_CD, (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM MCP_CODE@DL_MCP WHERE CODE_SYS = 'CHA' AND CODE = MQ.APP_CD) AS APP_CD_NAME, '0'AS ETC_DISCOUNT, MRS.SPRT_TP, /* 지원금 유형 */ MRS.MODEL_ID, MR.RATE_CD, OSPM.SALE_PLCY_CD, MQ.CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP, --단말배상금 안내사항 동의여부 MQ.CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR, --단말배상금(부분파손) 안내사항 동의여부 MQ.CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE, --중고렌탈 프로그램 서비스 이용에 대한 동의서 동의여부 MQ.CLAUSE_MPPS35_FLAG, --선불요금제 MPPS35 제약사항 동의 여부 MQ.CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG, --동부화재 제휴 요금제 약관 동의 여부 MQ.CLAUSE_5G_COVERAGE_FLAG, --5g 커버리지 확인 및 가입 동의 MQ.PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE, --고객 혜택 제공을 위한 개인정보 수집 및 이용 관련 동의 MQ.OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE, --혜택 제공을 위한 제3자 제공 동의(엠모바일) MQ.CLAUSE_PARTNER_OFFER_FLAG, --개인정보 제3자 제공 동의(제휴사) MQ.OPEN_MARKET_REFERER, --제휴사 MQ.JEHU_PROD_TYPE, --제휴처(제휴요금제) MQ.JEHU_PARTNER_TYPE, --제휴사 구분(서식지) MQ.OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE, --혜택 제공을 위한 제3자 제공 동의(KT) MQ.OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE, --제3자 제공관련 광고 수신 동의 MQ.CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG, MQ.COMBINE_SOLO_FLAG FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP MQ, MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP MRC, MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_MCP MRR, MCP_REQUEST_PAYMENT@DL_MCP MRP, MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP MRM, MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP MRS, MCP_CODE@DL_MCP MC, MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_MCP MRCG, MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP MRA, MCP_CODE@DL_MCP MCMINOR, MCP_CODE@DL_MCP MCENT, MCP_CODE@DL_MCP MCENB, MSP_RATE_MST MR, ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST OOIM, MSP_SALE_PLCY_MST OSPM WHERE MQ.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MQ.REQUEST_KEY AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MRR.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MRP.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MRS.REQUEST_KEY AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MRM.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MRCG.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MRA.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND MC.CODE_SYS(+) = 'NSC' AND MC.CODE(+) = MRM.MOVE_COMPANY AND MRS.SOC_CODE = MR.RATE_CD AND MCMINOR.CODE_SYS(+) = 'AGR' AND MCMINOR.CODE(+) = MRA.MINOR_AGENT_RELATION AND MCENT.CODE_SYS(+) = 'AGR' AND MCENT.CODE(+) = MRA.ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION AND MCENB.CODE_SYS(+) = 'BNK' AND MCENB.CODE(+) = MRR.REQ_BANK AND MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = OOIM.ORGN_ID(+) AND MRS.MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE = OSPM.SALE_PLCY_CD(+) )A, MSP_SALE_SUBSD_MST B WHERE A.SALE_PLCY_CD = B.SALE_PLCY_CD(+) AND A.SOC_CODE = B.RATE_CD(+) AND A.MODEL_ID = B.PRDT_ID(+) AND A.ENGG_MNTH_CNT = B.AGRM_TRM(+) AND A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = B.ORGN_ID(+) AND A.OPER_TYPE = B.OPER_TYPE(+)) APPDATA ) MAINDATA

/* scanMapper.getRequestJoinUserData */ SELECT MRC.CSTMR_NAME , MQ.RES_NO , MQ.AGENT_CODE , MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP MQ , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP MRC WHERE MQ.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND MQ.REQUEST_KEY = MRC.REQUEST_KEY

/* scanMapper.getAppFormPointList */ SELECT COLUMN_NAME , METAROW , METALINE , APP_KEY , CODEDATA , CODEDATA_YN , PAGEINDEX , DELETECOLUMNYN FROM MCP_APPLICATION_FORM_INFO@DL_MCP ORDER BY PAGEINDEX, APP_KEY

/* scanMapper.getAppFormPointGroupList */ SELECT A.GROUP_CODE, B.PAGE_SEQ, C.PAGE_CODE, C.COLUMN_NAME, C.METAROW, C.METALINE, C.CODEDATA, C.CODEDATA_YN, C.DELETECOLUMNYN FROM NMCP_APP_GROUP_MST@DL_MCP A, NMCP_APP_GROUP_INFO@DL_MCP B, NMCP_APP_FORM_INFO@DL_MCP C WHERE A.STATUS = 'A' AND A.GROUP_CODE = #{groupCode} AND A.GROUP_CODE = B.GROUP_CODE AND B.STATUS = 'A' AND B.PAGE_CODE = C.PAGE_CODE ORDER BY B.PAGE_SEQ, C.APP_KEY

/* scanMapper.getMcpCodeList */ SELECT A.CD_GROUP_ID , B.DTL_CD , COUNT(1) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT FROM NMCP_CD_GROUP_BAS@DL_MCP A , NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP B WHERE A.CD_GROUP_ID = B.CD_GROUP_ID AND A.CD_GROUP_ID = #{groupId} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' /* 2022.03.02 M포탈 리뉴얼로 조회 조건 추가 */ AND (A.PSTNG_START_DATE IS NULL OR A.PSTNG_END_DATE IS NULL OR SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) AND (B.PSTNG_START_DATE IS NULL OR B.PSTNG_END_DATE IS NULL OR SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(B.PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(B.PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'))
